       2e1bc:	f80c 5004 	strb.w	r5, [ip, r4]

       2e1c0:	465c      	mov	r4, fp

       2e1c2:	e77f      	b.n	2e0c4 <print_integer+0x210>

       2e1c4:	4651      	mov	r1, sl

       2e1c6:	2e00      	cmp	r6, #0

       2e1c8:	d0b7      	beq.n	2e13a <print_integer+0x286>

       2e1ca:	e75d      	b.n	2e088 <print_integer+0x1d4>
